sentences.sentence: First, stand the bike on its seat.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (first, stand, seat); consonant cluster (stand)

sentences.sentence: Next, unhook the brake cable.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (next, unhook, cable); consonant cluster (next)

sentences.sentence: Slide the tire levers under the rim to lift the tube.
sentences.structure: imperative with prepositional phrase and infinitive
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (slide); stress placement in compound noun (tire levers); linking (under_the, lift_the)

sentences.sentence: Pump a little air in and feel along the surface.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (air_in, feel_along); reduced function words (a, and); consonant cluster (pump)

sentences.sentence: Spread a thin layer of glue across the small hole.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (spread, across, small); linking (layer_of); reduced function words (a, of, the)

sentences.sentence: Once the glue turns sticky, press the patch down for one full minute.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across long sentence; linked speech across clause boundary (glue_turns); reduced function words in rapid sequence (for one)

sentences.sentence: Before you ride away, fit the wheel back on and check that the patch holds the pressure.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause + compound imperative (final step)
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across 17 words; linked speech across clause boundary (before_you); reduced function words (the, that the); final consonant cluster (holds)

sentences.sentence: The waiting room is just inside.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (room, just, inside); consonant cluster (just)

sentences.sentence: Sign-in tablets sit beside the desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (sign-in tablets, desk); stress placement in compound noun (sign-in tablets)

sentences.sentence: Same-day appointments are accepted every weekday before noon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (appointments, accepted); linking (are_accepted); reduced function words (every, before)

sentences.sentence: Your medical records can be updated at the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (records); stress placement in compound noun (front counter); linking (can_be_updated)

sentences.sentence: Flu shots and basic tests are offered in the back rooms.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters (shots, tests); compound noun (flu shots); linking (are_offered); reduced function words (and, in the)

sentences.sentence: Please collect your prescription slips from the pharmacy window.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (collect, prescription slips); stress placement in compound noun (pharmacy window); reduced function words (your, from the)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure which service you need, check the schedule posted near the main entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if_you_are); reduced function words in rapid sequence (which, you, the, near the); final consonant cluster (posted)

sentences.sentence: Safety goggles hang near the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (safety, near); stress placement in compound noun (safety goggles); clear word-final consonants (hang, door)

sentences.sentence: Lab coats are stored in the tall cabinet.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (coats, stored); stress placement in compound noun (lab coats); linking (are_stored); reduced function words (in the)

sentences.sentence: All liquid spills are reported to the officer immediately.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters (spills, reports); reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (immediately); reduced function words (to the)

sentences.sentence: The eyewash station stands at the end of each bench.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (stands, bench); stress placement in compound noun (eyewash station); reduced function words (at the, of)

sentences.sentence: Used glassware is rinsed and placed on the drying rack.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (rinsed, placed); compound noun (drying rack); linking (is_rinsed); reduced function words (on the)

sentences.sentence: Chemical bottles must be returned to their labeled shelves.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (bottles, shelves); reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (chemical); reduced function words (to their)

sentences.sentence: When you finish your experiment, check the chart for the correct way to dispose of each sample.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (finish, correct way); reduced function words in rapid sequence (to your, for the, of); stress-timing across 17 words
